race.description: Parkes Courier Service / Kennards Hire Hcp
race.comment: A plain race to close Cup Day. POWDERFINGER (10) proved far too strong last start at Binnaway in a Class 1 over 1200m. Won't mind the extra 100m and is open to further improvement at the third run back from a spell. Stablemate YIASOU (4) also went to Binnaway last start and missed by a whisker in a BM58 over today's trip. Placed at two of three runs at this stage of the campaign so he should hold that form. CALL ME TERRY (16) scored a tough win two back over 1400m at Wellington but disappointed when he tackled a similar race at Dubbo a fortnight ago. One of the better hopes if he brings his best form. ROLLED GOLD (5) chimed in late to score first-up over today's journey at Narromine recently. Gets in well after the claim and should play a key role again. CHARLIE MAGIC (7) hasn't been far away of late without winning. Must go in the numbers with a soft run assured out of the inside alley.
